context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

We want Infrastructure Explorer to populate for our K8s cluster. We've enabled kubernetesResources preset and we see logs flowing through the standard coralogix exporter, but the Resource Catalog stays empty. What pieces are we missing?

checklist.name: coralogix-resource-catalog-separate
checklist.description: The response matches the pattern: (?i)(coralogix/resource_catalog|separate exporter|dedicated exporter)
